title: Fluorescently Labeled Polyamine Uptake via Confocal Microscopy
author: Sarah van Veen
materials: Proceed with imaging or additional staining.

steps.title: Seed cells 96-well plate
steps.instruction: Seed cells 96-well plate. Allow the cells to attach and grow for approximately 24:00:00 .

steps.title: The day of the experiment, remove...
steps.instruction: The day of the experiment, remove cell culture medium and add fluorescently labeled polyamines to the cells in a final volume of 1000 µL, / well .

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C with 5%...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C with 5% CO₂ for the desired duration, ensuring protection from light.

steps.title: Wash cells 3 times in PBS-T...
steps.instruction: Wash cells 3 times in PBS-T ( 00:05:00 each wash) at Room temperature on a rocker.

steps.title: Incubate cells with DAPI (1:5000 in...
steps.instruction: Incubate cells with DAPI (1:5000 in PBS-T) for 00:15:00 at Room temperature , protected from light, on a rocker.

steps.title: Wash cells 3 times in PBS-T...
steps.instruction: Wash cells 3 times in PBS-T ( 00:05:00 each wash) on a rocker, protected from light.

steps.title: Wash cells Overnight with PBS-T at...
steps.instruction: Wash cells Overnight with PBS-T at 4 °C on a rocker, protected from light.

steps.title: Fix cells with 4% PFA in...
steps.instruction: Fix cells with 4% PFA in PBS for 00:30:00 at 37 °C .
